title: Fedora Desktop Expert is live
summary: Update your linux-admin plugin to get /linux-admin:fedora-desktop-expert plus chunked Fedora Desktop coverage for Workstation, KDE Plasma Edition, Spins, Atomic Desktops, Labs, Wayland/Xorg, kernels, hardware, UI extensions, SELinux, dnf/rpm-ostree updates, and security patch refresh workflows.
highlights: New /linux-admin:fedora-desktop-expert for Fedora desktop and official variant troubleshooting.
Chunked Fedora reference files make future category updates smaller and safer.
Repo-level CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, and SECURITY_PATCH_REFRESH_POLICY.md provide first-run context for Claude/Codex agents.
Plugin package metadata is aligned to 1.17.53 with 114 expert skills.
